category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a high-performance JavaScript and TypeScript linter; official Oxc docs describe Oxlint as a linter built on Oxc.
display_name_sources: Official Oxc documentation page title and heading use Oxlint; source_facts.name is oxlint.
docs_sources: Official Oxc docs page for Oxlint with guide, configuration, features, and references.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies JavaScript/TypeScript linting and Rust implementation; source_facts.executables lists oxlint CLI.
